## Description

Returns the geometry type of the supplied geometry, as a string. For example: `ST_Point`, `ST_LineString`, `ST_Polygon`, `ST_MultiPoint`, `ST_MultiLineString`, `ST_MultiPolygon`, or `ST_GeometryCollection`.
